title: UK's largest onshore wind farm to be rebuilt with fewer, larger turbines
description: Whitelee Windfarm has been producing electricity for about 20 years on a stretch of moorland near Eaglesham but is reaching the end of its life.
text: Whitelee Windfarm has been producing electricity for about 20 years on a stretch of moorland near Eaglesham but is reaching the end of its life.
speech_text:
UK's largest onshore wind farm to be rebuilt with fewer, larger turbines.

Whitelee Windfarm has been producing electricity for about 20 years on a stretch of moorland near Eaglesham but is reaching the end of its life.
thai_text: วิทเลีย วินด์ฟาร์ม ได้ผลิตไฟฟ้ามาประมาณ 20 ปี บนแหล่งปะการังใกล้ อีเกิลแชม.
